qa_pair.question: What is the `name` of the connected Framer project? (Return the value of projectInfo.name.)
How many WebPageNodes exist in the project? (Use framer_find_nodes_by_type with type "WebPageNode" and return the total count as a decimal integer.)
How many DesignPageNodes exist in the project? (Use framer_find_nodes_by_type with type "DesignPageNode" and return the total count.)
What is the `path` attribute of the home WebPageNode in the project? (Look up the WebPageNode whose path represents the site root.)
On the WebPageNode with path "/about", what is the `name` of its first direct child FrameNode? (Use framer_get_node_children on the page id.)
How many direct children does the FrameNode named "TeamGrid" on the "/about" page have? (Return the count as a decimal integer.)
On the "/pricing" page, how many FrameNodes have a name that starts with "Plan —"? (Use framer_get_node_children and count matching children.)
In the project's color styles, what is the `light` CSS color value of the color style named "Primary"? (Use framer_list_color_styles.)
How many color styles have a non-null `dark` value? (Use framer_list_color_styles and count entries where dark is not null.)
How many code files exist in the project with a `.tsx` extension? (Use framer_list_code_files and count by filename suffix.)
